element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Can attack standing or airborne; foundational combat tool
Decreases over time and on damage; replenished by collecting meat
Restores two health bars; scattered throughout levels
Require matching color keys to open; signal progression gating
Found as collectibles; unlock corresponding doors and chests
Required to bribe creature guarding entrance to next level; collectible resource

element_introduction_order.element: Throwing weapons (Dagger of Throwing, Battle Axe of Agor)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Return like boomerangs; limited on-screen count; fire-and-forget mechanic
Temporary power-ups; found in acorns, torches, chests
Allows kicking open chests and doors; replaces on pickup

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Level 1 - The Forest (repositioned in Japanese version)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Allows floating upward; helps reach high places
Slows falling speed; traversal aid
Allows walking on lava terrain; environment-specific adaptation
Frozen environment hazard; requires traversal skill
Heat hazard terrain; requires Boots of Lava Walk or careful platforming
Shoots ice balls; auto-firing in Japanese version
Shoots fire balls; auto-firing in Japanese version
Protects from enemy attacks; passive defense item
Makes Kuros invisible to enemies; stealth mechanic
Destroys all on-screen enemies; screen-clear utility
Stops all enemies briefly; crowd control
Reveals hidden doors to gem caves; secret-finding tool

element_introduction_order.element: Boss creatures with Black Magic Power meter
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Displays difficulty, hits required, required weapon type; escalates tension
Series of mazes requiring keys; culmination of all learned mechanics
Ultimate confrontation; end-game payoff

typical_relief_triggers: Obtaining Cloak of Darkness for invisibility
Exiting dangerous cave sections back to forest
typical_tension_triggers: Health meter continuously decreasing over time
Entering ice or lava caves without proper equipment
Boss creature encounters with high Black Magic Power meters
Limited projectile items on-screen (encourages resource awareness)
Falling without Feather of Feather Fall equipped
Gem collection pressure before level guardian encounter
Exposure to multiple enemy types in open areas
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation from forest exploration through environmental hazard gauntlets to labyrinthine castle finale; continuous health drain creates persistent tension punctuated by item acquisition relief

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Acorns, torches, treasure chests contain hidden items; colored doors lock optional treasure; horn reveals gem cave secrets
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Horn/trumpet reveals hidden doors to gem caves; high points and hidden rooms contain gems and potions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction in forest with basic enemies; teaches movement, jumping, basic sword combat, health management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Environmental hazards escalate (ice caves, lava caves); weapon variety expands; enemy density and complexity increase; requires equipment adaptation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Castle IronSpire maze complexity demands key management and navigation; final boss Malkil presents ultimate combat challenge; all learned mechanics synthesized
notable_spikes: First boss creature encounter introduces Black Magic Power meter and boss patterns
Transition to ice/lava caves introduces environmental hazards requiring specific items
Castle IronSpire entrance marks shift from exploration to puzzle-maze navigation
Final boss Malkil confrontation in tower finale

notable_level_patterns.description: Open-ended horizontal traversal through trees; introduces basic platforming, item collection, enemy encounters; encourages exploration of multiple paths to find keys and treasure
Themed cave systems (ice, lava) that require specific equipment to traverse safely; forces equipment choice and management
End-of-level boss creature with visible power meter; gates progression to next stage; demonstrates boss pattern expectations
Multi-room labyrinthine structure with color-coded doors requiring sequential key collection; emphasizes spatial memory and systematic exploration
Requires specific items (Potion of Levitation, bouncing mechanics) to reach high areas; introduces optional high-reward secret gems
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 1 peak areas (adjusted in Japanese version with easier potion placement)
